asset.title: L1 Read
asset.purpose: Silent workflow preview generated from app captures or trace replays. Judge whether it communicates the workflow and gate clearly.

judge.summary: A concise and clear workflow preview demonstrating an AI agent reading a financial table cell without making modifications.

featureClarity.evidence: The interface clearly highlights the specific row being read by the agent.

workflowCompleteness.evidence: Shows the initial goal, the active reading step, and the final completion state.

visualDesign.evidence: Clean dark-themed table layout with clear contrast and focused highlighting.

consistency.evidence: Aligns with the spreadsheet and agent execution trace paradigm.

evidenceQuality.evidence: Appears to be a direct capture of the application's execution interface.

legibility.evidence: All text, including the agent log at the bottom, is highly legible.

professionalRelevance.evidence: Demonstrates basic auditability of financial data access by an AI.

productionHonesty.evidence: Accurately represents a simple read-only operation without overclaiming.

observedEvidence: Highlighted table row for Net Income variance
Agent execution log showing read action and completion
judge.suggestedReadmeCaption: NodeRoom L1 Read workflow showing an AI agent safely reading financial variance data without altering the source sheet.
